overview: A premium, mobile-first demo website for Better Home – Real Estate Consultant, a real estate brand based in Ahmedabad (Bopal). Designed to impress clients instantly with cinematic animations, conversion-focused lead capture, and a polished orange-and-white visual identity.
features: Cinematic hero with parallax zoom and stagger animations
Interactive property listings with hover lift and ripple effects
Smart filter bar for Budget, Location, and Type
Lead capture form with instant callback CTA
Trust bar with social proof metrics
Sticky mobile bottom CTA bar (Call, WhatsApp, Get Options)
Fake testimonials for demo social proof
